description: EXCEPT returns rows from the first SELECT that are not present in the second SELECT
name: select_except
query_sql:
-- @name FindUsersNotInContacts
-- @returns :many
SELECT name, email FROM users EXCEPT SELECT name, email FROM contacts
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE contacts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL);
